## New Component Submission

### Package Name
<!-- e.g., codeupipe-twilio -->


### What does this component do?
<!-- One paragraph explaining the use case -->


### PyPI Link
<!-- e.g., https://pypi.org/project/codeupipe-twilio/ -->


### Quick Usage Example
```python
# Show how a developer would use this in a pipeline
```

### Checklist

- [ ] My package is published on PyPI and `pip install` works
- [ ] My package registers via `[project.entry-points."codeupipe.connectors"]`
- [ ] I filled in all fields in `manifest.json`
- [ ] `python validate.py` passes locally
- [ ] I set `trust` to `"community"` (not `"verified"`)
- [ ] My package has tests
- [ ] My package has a README with usage instructions
